completionPosture: The SDK strategy identifies the exact semantic capability gap and blocks promotion instead of substituting a nearby primitive.
nearbyCapabilityRejectionReason: evidence.receipt.verify.v1 verifies declared receipt/artifact hash equality; it does not validate sha256:<64 lowercase hex> string shape.
storyText: As a Defracto operator, I want a receipt hash validator SDK capability, so that malformed evidence hashes cannot enter a release packet.
